# Requirements Analysis

Use this skill when the request is still fuzzy and needs a grounded problem statement.

## Procedure

1. Capture the user goal in one sentence.
2. Separate functional requirements from constraints.
3. List assumptions, risks, and open questions.
4. Define acceptance criteria that can be tested.

## Useful Output

- Problem statement
- In scope / out of scope
- Constraints
- Acceptance criteria
- Open questions
